n: The Crew: Carver of Distant Stone

steps.t: Kutúkh told you that Gangur Farwend mentioned stopping at the outpost of Zarsatrâd to the south before continuing his journey.
Gangur Farwend is at the outpost of Zarsatrâd, south of Furukzahar.
Gangur Farwend is at the outpost of Zarsatrâd, south of Furukzahar.
Gangur Farwend stormed from Zarsatrâd after being embarrassed by the dwarves there. It looked to you as if he was heading in the direction of Erynos, …
Gangur Farwend is south-east of Zarsatrâd and north of Erynos, in King's Gondor East.
